name: Jointo Energy Investment Co., Ltd. Hebei
summary: Jointo Energy Investment Co., Ltd. Hebei invests in, constructs, operates, and manages energy projects primarily based on electricity production. The company focuses on coal-fired power generation and heating, as well as nuclear power, wind power, hydropower, etc. As of December 31, 2019, it controlled operating installed capacity of 8.15 million kilowatts, controlled installed capacity of 350,000 kilowatts, and equity operating installed capacity of 8.67 million kilowatts. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Shijiazhuang, China.
